utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 top-level items. Now check each for full specification per the format: 1) health_coverage: 'physical and mental health insurance with costs' — provided with physical plan, mental plan, and a combined monthly cost; fully specified. 2) property_coverage: 'home/contents insurance with costs' — provided with a specific home/contents plan and monthly cost; fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: 'travel insurance with costs' — provided with a travel insurance plan and monthly cost; fully specified. 4) additional_services: 'any enhancement services with costs' — an assessment service is listed but no costs are provided; not fully specified. 5) total_budget: 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown' — only a monthly total is given; no annual breakdown provided, so not fully specified. Therefore, 3 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each selected item from the final coverage plan to the exact matching option in the ground-truth list and extract its rating. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), InsurePlus Standard Plan (mental health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (home/contents), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel insurance). Match each to the corresponding category entry and record the provided numeric rating.
